name: C2xGetTokenData
title: C2xGetTokenData
syntax: long C2xGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, char buffer[] );
description: This function requests the data or a part of date of a token.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

return:
Number of copied bytes or 0
With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
